## Checklist

- [ ] Example runs cleanly on simulator (`ZHILICON_DEVICE=simulator`)
- [ ] README.md included in the example directory
- [ ] `requirements.txt` present with pinned versions
- [ ] No credentials, secrets, or hardcoded endpoints
- [ ] DCO sign-off: `git commit -s`
- [ ] Code follows PEP 8 (Python) or Google style (C++)
